## Feature summary
Describe the feature in one short paragraph.

## Problem it solves
What server/gameplay problem does this solve?

## Proposed behavior
Describe exact command/UI/config behavior.

## Example usage
Provide practical examples.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you think about?

## Additional context
Any extra details, mockups, or references.
